name: Epsilon Energy Ltd.
business: Epsilon Energy Ltd. is an independent natural gas and oil company engaged in the acquisition, development, gathering and production of natural gas and oil reserves. The company sells natural gas, natural gas liquids, and oil to customers in the United States and Canada. It also provides natural gas gathering services through its 35% ownership in the Auburn Gas Gathering System.

exposures.sentence: Epsilon is a North American on-shore focused independent natural gas and oil company engaged in the acquisition, development, gathering and production of natural gas and oil reserves.

catalysts.event: Acquired Peak Exploration & Production LLC and subsidiaries
catalysts.sentence: On November 14, 2025, Epsilon acquired Peak Exploration & Production LLC and Peak BLM Lease LLC and their subsidiaries (together, Peak ) for total consideration of $88.5 million consisting of 1) issuance of 5,681,489 common shares valued at $27.6 million, 2) contingent consideration of up to 2,500,000 common shares valued at $10.6 million, and the settlement of $50.3 million of debt.

catalysts.event: Divested Dewey Energy Holdings, LLC (Oklahoma assets)
catalysts.sentence: On December 11, 2025, Epsilon divested Dewey Energy Holdings, LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company to an undisclosed private buyer for $2.5 million.

catalysts.event: Closed new senior secured reserve based revolving credit facility
catalysts.sentence: On October 10, 2025, the Company closed a new senior secured reserve based revolving credit facility with Frost Bank as administrative agent and Frost Bank and Texas Capital Bank as lenders.

catalysts.event: Turned on line 4 gross wells in Pennsylvania
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, 4 gross (0.24 net) wells were turned on line in January 2025 and 3 gross (0.04) wells were turned on line in March 2025.

catalysts.event: Turned on line 3 gross wells in Pennsylvania
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, 4 gross (0.24 net) wells were turned on line in January 2025 and 3 gross (0.04) wells were turned on line in March 2025.

catalysts.event: Turned on line 1 gross well in Texas
catalysts.sentence: This well went into production in July 2025.

catalysts.event: Turned on line 2 gross wells in Canada
catalysts.sentence: The two wells turned on line in March 2025.

catalysts.event: Settled contingent consideration for Peak acquisition via share issuance
catalysts.sentence: The contingent consideration was settled on November 19, 2025, through the issuance of 2,234,847 common shares for $10.6 million.

On February 18, 2026, the Board authorized a new share repurchase program of up to 3,014,986 common shares, representing 10% of the current outstanding common shares of Epsilon, for an aggregate purchase price of not more than US $15.0 million.

catalysts.event: Made $5 million repayment on credit facility
catalysts.sentence: During March 2026, the Company made a $5 million repayment on the outstanding credit facility.
